_fixture_notes: Case 15: Step groups include labels not used by any ingredient. Ingredient groups: ['sauce', 'pasta']. Step groups: ['sauce', 'pasta', 'finishing', 'plating']. The 'finishing' and 'plating' step groups have no corresponding ingredient group. Spec says step group labels should match ingredient group vocabulary but doesn't enforce. Tests cooking-mode UI behaviour when step groups are a strict superset of ingredient groups.
name: Garlic & Chilli Spaghetti
description: Classic aglio e olio. Fixture exercising step-group / ingredient-group label mismatch.

steps.title: Cook the pasta
steps.content: Boil well-salted water and cook {0005} according to packet timing.

steps.title: Infuse the oil
steps.content: Meanwhile, heat {0001} gently with {0002} and {0003} until the garlic is pale gold and the oil is fragrant.

steps.title: Toss everything together
steps.content: Drain {0005} (reserving a splash of pasta water) and add to the pan. Toss with the sauce, adding pasta water if needed for emulsion.

steps.title: Plate and serve
steps.content: Twist into bowls and finish with {0004}.

notes: The 'finishing' and 'plating' step groups don't correspond to any ingredient group — intentional for this fixture.
